info.title: CodeGenTools
info.description: Helper tools to quickly generate boilerplate serverless API's, Angular components and Cloudformation Scripts

options.name: --type
options.description: Type of Lambda. Options are: api, dynamo-worker, worker, sqs-worker

options.name: --add-dynamo
options.description: Pass this flag to add DynamoDB to the project

options.name: --add-elasticsearch
options.description: Pass this flag to add permissions for Elastic Search

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --page
options.description: Pass this flag to generate a page with routing capabilities instead of a component [default: False]

options.name: --path
options.description: Relative path where to generate the component

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the component or page

options.name: --service-file
options.description: Pass this flag to generate a service file with the page or component [default: True]

options.name: --story-file
options.description: Pass this flag to generate a storybook file with the page or component [default: True]

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of this shared package

options.name: --integrations
options.description: External packages to integrate with this Shared Project. Seperated by a comma. Valid values are: dynamo

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: infra
commands.description: Generates Infrastructure Cloudformation Scripts with DynamoDB creation as a template

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Sets the defaults for this tool

options.name: --echo
options.description: Echos the current Setup configuration

options.name: --delete
options.description: Delete a setup

options.name: --org-name
options.description: The Name of the orginazation e.g. Microsoft (Pty) Ltd

options.name: --build-variables-group-name
options.description: Name of the Variable group containing all the build variables e.g. "Build Variables" [default: Build Variables]

options.name: --azure-org
options.description: Name of the orginazation in Azure DevOps e.g. https://dev.azure.com/microsoft (Only the last part)

options.name: --azure-project
options.description: Project Name in Azure DevOps e.g. https://dev.azure.com/microsoft/Calculator_Project (Only the last part)

options.name: --org-prefix
options.description: Prefix of the orginazation e.g. MS for Microsoft. Should be between 2 and 3 chars, and contain no numbers

options.name: --feed-source-url
options.description: The source url of the private feed hosted in Azure Devops e.g. https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/microsoft/_packaging/Microsoft/nuget/v3/index.json

options.name: --feed-source-pat
options.description: Personal Access Token to access the private feed

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: open
commands.description: Opens the current project in Visual Studio

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
